predicates.name: is_surviving_spouse_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving spouse of the second (deceased) person.

predicates.name: is_deceased
predicates.description: The person is deceased and their estate has opened.

predicates.name: is_heir_of
predicates.description: The first person is an heir of the second (deceased) person.

predicates.name: served_as_family_principal_residence_at_estate_opening
predicates.description: The immovable property served as the family's principal residence at the time the estate of the deceased person opened.

predicates.name: property_subject_to_lease
predicates.description: The immovable property is subject to the given lease.

predicates.name: acquires_right_to_lease
predicates.description: The surviving spouse acquires the right to the lease of the immovable property that served as the family's principal residence at the time the estate opened.

predicates.name: excluded_from_lease_right
predicates.description: The person (heir other than the surviving spouse) is excluded from the right to the lease.
